name: Hello World (Discovery)
author: InSpectre Community
description: Minimal example plugin. Polls a generic JSON HTTP endpoint that returns a list of DHCP leases and feeds them into the InSpectre device inventory. Copy this file and adapt the endpoint, auth, and field mapping to your own device's API.

config_schema.label: API Base URL
config_schema.help: Base URL of the device/API exposing the lease list. No trailing slash.

config_schema.label: API Key
config_schema.help: Sent in the X-API-Key header on every request.

get_leases.description: Fetch the current DHCP lease table.

test_connection.description: Used by the 'Test Connection' button in the UI.
